translation_findings.issue: Same pattern as p120 term 4P: zh surface expands '4C' to '4C营销理论' (4C Marketing Theory) — adds 营销理论 not in JP. EN remains bare '4C'. Glossary-style alias expansion, consistent across pages, but asymmetric jp/zh/en.
translation_findings.suggested_fix: Standardize: either bare '4C' in zh or '4C (Marketing Theory)' in en.

translation_findings.jp: これまで4Pを使って考えられてきた「売り手の視点」を「買い手の視点」に転換させた概念です
translation_findings.zh: 它将以往使用4P营销组合所考虑的"卖方视角"转换为"买方视角"的概念
translation_findings.en: It is a concept that shifts the "seller's perspective" previously considered using 4P to the "buyer's perspective."
translation_findings.issue: ZH adds '营销组合' to '4P' alias inline; jp/en keep bare '4P'. Same alias-expansion pattern, internally consistent with p120 zh treatment. No semantic distortion.
translation_findings.suggested_fix: Drop '营销组合' inline; rely on glossary.

translation_findings.issue: ZH expands both '4P'→'4P营销组合' AND '4C'→'4C营销理论' in figure caption; jp+en keep bare 4P/4C. Most aggressive alias expansion of the three leaves. Still consistent with the term-surface convention on this page and p120; not release-impacting but visually heavier than jp/en counterparts.
translation_findings.suggested_fix: Consider 'zh: 4P与4C' for caption parity with jp/en.

narrative: 3 term entities (4C, 3C分析, RFM分析) + 2 figures (4Pと4C, 3C分析). Semantic translations faithful: 'Customer Value (顧客にとっての価値)' → '顾客价值' / 'Customer Value', 'Recency (最終購買日)' → '最近购买日' / 'date of last purchase', '優良顧客' → '优质顾客' / 'valuable customers'. All clean. WARN-level only on zh-side alias expansion of 4P/4C (adds 营销组合/营销理论 not present in jp/en). No inversion, no hallucination, no marker issues.
